acceptance_targets: [CH17-PR-001] Pass if revised lines 9/103/209/305 and 11/255/317/529 no longer rely on the same response/opening formulas and each replacement adds new scene-specific information (not just synonyms); fail if the same two constructions still dominate those beats.

[CH17-PR-002] Pass if the revised 401-427 span includes at least three distributed interior beats and no run exceeds five consecutive paragraphs without focalized interior experience; fail if the passage remains predominantly external observation/dialogue for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised lines 9/103/209/305 and 11/255/317/529 no longer rely on the same response/opening formulas and each replacement adds new scene-specific information (not just synonyms); fail if the same two constructions still dominate those beats.
findings.problem: Recurring formula tics flatten texture: repeated nod-beat responses and repeated sentence-openers that personify 'the house' appear often enough to read as autopilot rather than intentional variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the cited lines, replace at least half of repeated nod/personified-house constructions with distinct action, sensory, or interior beats tied to immediate stakes; prioritize variation in sentence openings and response mechanics.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised 401-427 span includes at least three distributed interior beats and no run exceeds five consecutive paragraphs without focalized interior experience; fail if the passage remains predominantly external observation/dialogue for 10+ consecutive paragraphs.
findings.problem: A 10+ paragraph stretch in the warehouse onboarding scene runs without Eli interiority, turning the focalized chapter into external transcript and weakening close-third pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:401-427` to braid in Eli's thought, sensation, or self-assessment during onboarding beats (bus stop, office intake, shift terms) without changing scene events.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
